args.query:
SELECT norm_owner_id, AVG(days) as avg_days, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM (
 SELECT 
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END as norm_owner_id,
  (CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) as days
 FROM Opportunity o
 JOIN Contract c ON (CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.ContractID__c),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.ContractID__c),2) ELSE trim(o.ContractID__c) END) = (CASE WHEN substr(trim(c.Id),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(c.Id),2) ELSE trim(c.Id) END)
 WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= '2023-04-01' AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
) t
WHERE days >= 0
GROUP BY norm_owner_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT norm_owner_id, AVG(days) as avg_days, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM (
 SELECT 
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END as norm_owner_id,
  (CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) as days
 FROM Opportunity o
 JOIN Contract c ON (CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.ContractID__c),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.ContractID__c),2) ELSE trim(o.ContractID__c) END) = (CASE WHEN substr(trim(c.Id),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(c.Id),2) ELSE trim(c.Id) END)
 WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= '2023-04-01' AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
) t
WHERE days >= 0
GROUP BY norm_owner_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
